hooks.command: python -c "import os, subprocess, sys; runner = os.path.join(os.environ['HARNESS_SKILL_ROOT'], 'hooks', 'harness_hook.py'); sys.exit(subprocess.call([sys.executable, runner, '--event', 'session-start', '--platform', 'claude']))"

python -c "import os, subprocess, sys; runner = os.path.join(os.environ['HARNESS_SKILL_ROOT'], 'hooks', 'harness_hook.py'); sys.exit(subprocess.call([sys.executable, runner, '--event', 'pre-compact', '--platform', 'claude']))"

python -c "import os, subprocess, sys; runner = os.path.join(os.environ['HARNESS_SKILL_ROOT'], 'hooks', 'harness_hook.py'); sys.exit(subprocess.call([sys.executable, runner, '--event', 'stop', '--platform', 'claude']))"
